summary: Iteration 9: Calendar Feature Testing - 'Aujourd'hui' button and 'Réserver un véhicule' button. All 9 test scenarios passed. Features working as expected on mobile viewport (400x800).

test_1_calendar_view_current_month.details: Calendar shows Février 2026 (current month) with today (26) highlighted in purple background

test_2_aujourdhui_button_hidden_current_.details: 'Aujourd'hui' button is NOT visible when viewing the current month (Février 2026) - correct behavior

test_3_month_navigation_forward.details: Clicking right arrow (>) navigates to Mars 2026 successfully

test_4_aujourdhui_button_appears.details: 'Aujourd'hui' button appears with calendar icon and purple border when on non-current month (Mars 2026)

test_5_aujourdhui_click_returns_to_curre.details: Clicking 'Aujourd'hui' button returns calendar to Février 2026 (current month) and button disappears

test_6_free_date_booking_button.details: Clicking free future date (March 10) shows 'Aucune réservation' text and 'Réserver un véhicule' button with + icon

test_7_book_button_navigation.details: Clicking 'Réserver un véhicule' button navigates to /vehicles page successfully

test_8_past_date_no_booking_button.details: Past date (Feb 10, 2026) shows 'Aucune réservation' but NO 'Réserver un véhicule' button - correct behavior

test_9_occupied_date_no_booking_button.details: Occupied date (Oct 15 with Volkswagen Golf reservation) shows event card with vehicle details but NO 'Réserver un véhicule' button - correct behavior

test_10_french_accents.details: French text displays correctly with proper accents: réservation, Confirmée, Terminées, véhicule - no escaped unicode characters

seed_data_used: Existing Volkswagen Golf reservation (Oct 15-18, 2026) for client1@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All calendar features fully operational: 'Aujourd'hui' button correctly shows/hides based on current month, 'Réserver un véhicule' button appears only for free future dates (not past/occupied dates), navigation to vehicles page works. French accents display correctly throughout the app.

test_evidence.calendar_fevrier_2026: Shows current month with today (26) highlighted, 'Aujourd'hui' button hidden
test_evidence.calendar_mars_2026: Shows 'Aujourd'hui' button with calendar icon and purple border
test_evidence.free_date_selected: March 10: 'Aucune réservation' + 'Réserver un véhicule' button visible
test_evidence.past_date_selected: Feb 10: 'Aucune réservation' only, NO booking button
test_evidence.occupied_date_selected: Oct 15: Event card shows Volkswagen Golf, Espèces en attente, CHF 195.00, NO booking button
test_evidence.vehicles_page_navigation: URL changed to /vehicles after clicking 'Réserver un véhicule'
